description_long: This is a Rawlings baseball glove featuring a closed basket webbing pattern on the catching surface, with a combination of dark maroon and black leather panels accented by white lacing and stitching. The glove has prominent white branding, including the Rawlings logo and script, on the back and wrist strap. The finger stalls are individually padded and separated, with reinforced lacing along the edges and between the fingers for durability and structure. The palm area is deeply pocketed, designed to securely catch and hold a baseball. The wrist strap is padded and features a visible Rawlings logo patch, with a partially open design for easy hand insertion. The overall construction suggests a high-quality, professional-grade glove suitable for use in parks, sports fields, or urban recreational areas.
description: A high-quality Rawlings baseball glove with closed basket webbing, maroon and black leather, white lacing, and prominent branding. The glove features padded finger stalls and a structured wrist strap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed basket webbing, Rawlings logo, and detailed lacing on the catching surface.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded wrist strap with Rawlings patch and the segmented finger stalls.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the glove's deep pocket, interior red lining, and reinforced lacing along the fingers.
description_view_3: Back view emphasizing the closed webbing, white lacing, and 'THE GOLD GLOVE CO.' branding on the back panel.
attribute_finger_stalls: Five individually padded and separated finger stalls, each reinforced with lacing and shaped for ergonomic fit.
attribute_lacing_style: Cross-laced pattern on the webbing, single-laced along the finger edges and perimeter, with prominent white lacing throughout.
attribute_brand_logo: Rawlings logo visible on the back of the glove, wrist strap, and webbing; white script and emblem on black and maroon backgrounds.
attribute_wrist_strap_design: Padded wrist strap with partially open design, featuring a stitched Rawlings patch and no visible closure mechanism.
